title: teucrium teucriiflorum
intro: Teucrium teucriiflorum, also known as the perennial Germander, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Teucrium teucriiflorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
